videoSnippet.title: Unacceptable! || Wei Yi vs Hikaru Nakamura || FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 R4

Wei, Yi (2754) - Nakamura, Hikaru (2810)
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [04] 2026.04.01
B90 Sicilian, Najdorf, Lipnitzky attack

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.Nc3 Nf6 4.Bc4 a6 5.d4 cxd4 6.Nxd4 g6 7.f3 b5 8.Bb3 Bb7 9.Be3 Nbd7 10.a4 bxa4 11.Bxa4 Bg7 12.Nc6 Qc7 13.Na5 O-O 14.Bxd7 Nxd7 15.Bd4 Bh6 16.O-O e6 17.Qe1 Rab8 18.Qh4 Bg7 19.Bxg7 Kxg7 20.Qf2 Bc8 21.Nd1 Nf6 22.c4 d5 23.cxd5 exd5 24.e5 Ng8 25.Nc3 Ne7 26.Rfc1 Qd8 27.Rd1 Be6 28.Nc4 Nf5 29.Nd6 Nxd6 30.exd6 Qxd6 31.Qd4+ Kg8 32.Nxd5 Bxd5 33.Qxd5 Qb6+ 34.Qd4 Qxd4+ 35.Rxd4 Rxb2 36.Rxa6 Rc8 37.h4 Rcc2 38.Rg4 h5 39.Rg5 Rc4 40.Kh2 Rxh4+ 41.Kg1 Rb1+ 42.Kf2 Rhh1 43.Ra2 Kg7 44.Re5 Kh6 45.Ree2 Rhf1+ 46.Kg3 Kg5 47.Ra4 Rh1 48.Ree4 Rb2 49.Rab4 Rxb4 50.Rxb4 h4+ 51.Kf2 f5 52.Ra4 Rb1 53.Rc4 Ra1 54.Rb4 Rd1 55.Ra4 Rb1 56.Rc4 Rb2+ 57.Kg1 h3 58.gxh3 f4 59.h4+ Kxh4 60.Rxf4+ Kg3 61.Rg4+ Kxf3 62.Rxg6
